title: Onshore wind and solar cost and technical assumptions
body: "DESNZ commissioned Arup to undertake this research covering updates to the cost and technical assumptions for the following technologies:   onshore wind large-scale solar PV (>5MW)   The evidence drawn from research reviews in the Generation Costs Series informs:   cost estimates and technical assumptions within the Generation Costs Reports administrative strike prices (ASP) analysis for the Contracts for Difference (CfD) renewables deployment scheme power sector modelling   "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
